title: Identify Entra ID privileged accounts that are also privileged in Active Directory
remediation:
1. Review each dual-privileged account and determine whether access is required in both environments.
2. Remove unnecessary privileges from either Entra ID or Active Directory to reduce exposure.
3. Consider separating cloud and on-prem roles across different accounts or implementing just-in-time access.
4. Use Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM) to enforce approval of workflows and limit standing access.
remediationImpact: A compromise of a user account that holds privileges in both Entra ID and Active Directory can result in both environments being fully compromised. These dual-privileged accounts provide attackers with a direct path to escalate control across cloud and on-prem resources, bypassing typical isolation boundaries. Identifying and reducing this overlap is critical to limiting blast radius and protecting your hybrid identity infrastructure.
